data.title: Alibaba, Grab, Tencent, Meituan Gear Up For Growth As China Bets On Services To Revive Economy
data.description: In 2024, Consumption will be the main driver of economic growth, with service consumption being a new growth engine.

data.title: Cannabis Firm Cresco Labs Reports Mixed Q4, CEO Says Company Will 'Strategically Deploy Capital To Create Growth' In 2025
data.description: Cresco Labs posts Q4 revenue of $175.91M, beating estimates. The company secured a Tier 3 cultivation license in Kentucky, expanding its market presence.

data.title: $1000 Invested In This Stock 15 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
Arcos Dorados Q4 Earnings: Sales Slip, EPS Beat, South Latin America Strength And More
data.description: Arcos Dorados beats Q4 EPS estimates, reports strong growth in systemwide sales, and reaffirms 2025 guidance for new openings and capital expenditures.

data.title: Canada 'Had Enough,' Claps Back At US With $20 Billion In Retaliatory Tariffs: Foreign Affairs Minister
data.description: Canada announced Wednesday that it will impose 25% tariffs on over $20 billion worth of U.S. goods. Canadian Finance Minister Dominic LeBlanc confirmed that the tariffs will take effect Thursday.
